landing.heroDescription: OptiFlow is a visual Kanban board built for optician shops. See every order at a glance, reduce delays, and keep your whole team in sync — on any tablet.
landing.featSnapDesc: Take a photo of the prescription. OCR extracts the data — no manual entry needed.
landing.featProgressDesc: Five clear stages from order to pickup. Drag cards across columns as work progresses.
landing.featTeamDesc: Every employee sees the same live board. No more sticky notes or spreadsheets.
landing.footer: OptiFlow — Built for opticians, by people who care about clarity.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.description: Interested in trying OptiFlow for your shop? Fill out the form below and we'll get back to you with a demo.
contact.messagePlaceholder: Tell us about your shop and what you're looking for...
contact.success: Message sent! We'll be in touch soon.

login.title: Sign In
login.description: Select your shop and employee to continue

orderDetail.pickedUpSuccess: Order for {clientName} marked as picked up

newOrder.title: New Order
newOrder.chooseFlow: How would you like to enter the prescription?
newOrder.capturePrompt: Take a photo of the doctor's prescription

scanReceived.title: Scan Received Orders
scanReceived.description: Match a received delivery to an existing order
scanReceived.scanPrompt: Take a photo of the delivery package label
scanReceived.selectOrder: Select an order to mark as received:
scanReceived.movedSuccess: Order moved to Ready to Assemble
